headline: Innovations & Strategic Buyouts Aid Rollins Amid Integration Risk
summary: ROL's growth rides on tech-driven efficiency and steady acquisitions. Its rising costs, integration risks and liquidity concerns could weigh on margins.

headline: Equifax : How Loan Stacking Can Impact Lenders and Consumers
summary: Loan stacking is when someone takes out multiple loans with different lenders at the same time without the intent to pay. While many consumers have more than one loan - such as a mortgage and a car...
